violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not properly date marked.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Cooking on stove top not under the vent hood.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Paper towel dispenser at the hand wash sink was not operating.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not properly date marked. -Containers in both refrigerators not date marked.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Vent hood doesn't cover stove top used to cook proteins.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Large vent hood needs cleaned.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. -Chemicals stored on top of the back refrigerator.
